mapper.sql: n.id, n.title, n.content, n.type, n.status, n.publisher_id AS publisherId, u.username AS publisherName, n.publish_time AS publishTime
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM sys_notice n LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON u.id = n.publisher_id AND u.deleted = 0 WHERE n.id = #{noticeId} AND n.deleted = 0

SELECT , 0 AS readFlag FROM sys_notice n LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON u.id = n.publisher_id AND u.deleted = 0 WHERE n.deleted = 0 AND n.status = 1 AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM sys_notice_read r WHERE r.notice_id = n.id AND r.user_id = #{userId} ) ORDER BY COALESCE(n.publish_time, n.created_at) DESC, n.id DESC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM sys_notice n WHERE n.deleted = 0 AND n.status = 1 AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM sys_notice_read r WHERE r.notice_id = n.id AND r.user_id = #{userId} )

SELECT , CASE WHEN r.id IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS readFlag FROM sys_notice n LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON u.id = n.publisher_id AND u.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN sys_notice_read r ON r.notice_id = n.id AND r.user_id = #{userId} WHERE n.deleted = 0 AND n.status = 1 ORDER BY COALESCE(n.publish_time, n.created_at) DESC, n.id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT n.id FROM sys_notice n WHERE n.deleted = 0 AND n.status = 1 AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM sys_notice_read r WHERE r.notice_id = n.id AND r.user_id = #{userId} )
